message.content:
You are test-agent for task T1: M1-Foundation — User Entity + JWT Infrastructure.

INPUT (Read these files FIRST):
- PLAN: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/m1-m2-m3-m6/2026-03-06-PLAN.md
- CONTRACT: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/m1-m2-m3-m6/2026-03-06-CONTRACT.md
- READONLY context: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/config/SecurityConfig.java, C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/resources/application.yml
- Test directory: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/
- Log output: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/m1-m2-m3-m6/logs/test-agent-1.log.md

Task description:
Build M1 authentication foundation infrastructure.

ALLOWED implementation files (that the Worker will create — you write tests for these):
1. entity/User.java — User entity (id, username, password, displayName, createdAt)
2. repository/UserRepository.java — JPA repository (findByUsername)
3. security/JwtTokenProvider.java — JWT token generation, parsing, validation
4. security/JwtAuthFilter.java — OncePerRequestFilter, extract token from header → validate → set SecurityContext
5. config/SecurityConfig.java — Modify existing: add JwtAuthFilter, /api/auth/** permitAll

Acceptance criteria to test:
- User entity has correct JPA annotations, password not exposed in responses
- JwtTokenProvider can generate tokens containing userId, parse them, validate them, detect expired tokens
- JwtAuthFilter correctly intercepts requests: no token → 401, valid token → sets authentication, invalid token → 401
- SecurityConfig correctly configures filter chain with JWT filter

YOUR JOB: Design and write tests BEFORE any implementation code exists.
You are NOT writing implementation. You are writing test specifications that a Worker will code against.

TEST DESIGN STRATEGY:

1. Red/Green Tests — from acceptance criteria
   - One test per acceptance criterion
   - Test the happy path first
   - Use descriptive test names: "should {expected behavior} when {condition}"

2. Boundary Tests — edge cases
   - Empty inputs, null values
   - Expired tokens, malformed tokens

3. Error Case Tests — failure paths
   - Invalid token format
   - Missing Authorization header

4. Contract Tests
   - JWT token contains expected claims (userId)
   - SecurityConfig permits /api/auth/** and blocks other endpoints

TDD DISCIPLINE:
- Write the MINIMUM test that verifies the acceptance criterion
- Each test MUST be runnable and MUST fail (no implementation exists)
- Tests must use Spring Boot Test framework (@SpringBootTest, @DataJpaTest, @WebMvcTest, MockMvc)
- For JwtTokenProvider: unit tests (no Spring context needed, just new JwtTokenProvider(...))
- For JwtAuthFilter: mock-based unit tests
- For SecurityConfig integration: @SpringBootTest with MockMvc
- Name tests descriptively: "should {expected behavior} when {condition}"
- RED-GREEN flow: your tests are RED. Worker makes them GREEN.

IMPORTANT: 
- Use JUnit 5 + Spring Boot Test (already in pom.xml)
- Package: com.taskflow (match source package structure)
- Test files go under: taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/
- Do NOT create implementation files or stubs

OUTPUT:
- Write test file(s) following project's existing test framework
- Return: list of test file paths created

LOG WRITING:
Write to the log path (append-only):

On start:
[LOG] task=T1 | event=test-design-start | strategy=red-green,boundary,error,contract

Before returning:
[LOG] task=T1 | event=test-design-complete | test-files={list} | test-count={number}

content.text: I'll start by reading the PLAN, CONTRACT, and context files to understand the requirements, then design and write the tests.

     3→[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + Java 17 + H2 in-memory + JPA + Spring Security + JJWT 0.12.5 | Vue 3.4 + Pinia 2.1 + axios + vue-router + Vite 5 + Vitest + TypeScript | stateless JWT auth | soft-delete pattern | state machine in enum

     5→[CONSTRAINTS] M4/M5 not implemented — M6 uses placeholder for assignee/tags | H2 in-memory (create-drop) | JWT secret in application.yml | all /api/** require auth except /api/auth/** and /h2-console/**
     6→[SHARED] config/SecurityConfig.java | entity/Task.java | service/TaskService.java | controller/TaskController.java | exception/GlobalExceptionHandler.java

    10→[OVERRIDE] follow-actual-code

1→[SECTION] API Contract
     2→[VERSION] 1
     3→
     4→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/register | req={username:string(3-50,alphanumeric+underscore),password:string(min8),displayName:string(1-100)} | res=201:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=400,409
     5→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res=200:{token:string,expiresIn:long} | errors=401
     6→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none | res=200:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
     7→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,default:MEDIUM)} | res=201:{id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:string,status:string,createdBy:long,createdAt:datetime,updatedAt:datetime?} | errors=400,401
     8→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=200:{id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:string,status:string,createdBy:long,createdAt:datetime,updatedAt:datetime?} | errors=401,404
     9→[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,optional)} | res=200:{same-as-get} | errors=400,401,404
    10→[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=204:no-content | errors=401,404
    11→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=query:{page:int(default:0),size:int(default:20),sort:string(default:createdAt,desc),keyword:string?,priority:enum?} | res=200:{content:TaskResponse[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int} | errors=401
    12→[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)} | res=200:{same-as-task-response} | errors=400,401,404
    13→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none | res=200:{currentStatus:string,availableTransitions:string[]} | errors=401,404
    14→
    15→[SECTION] Shared Types
    16→[TYPE] name=TaskResponse | fields=id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:Priority,status:TaskStatus,createdBy:long,createdAt:LocalDateTime,updatedAt:LocalDateTime?
    17→[TYPE] name=UserResponse | fields=id:long,username:string,displayName:string
    18→[TYPE] name=PageResponse<T> | fields=content:T[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int
    19→[TYPE] name=Priority | fields=enum:HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW
    20→[TYPE] name=TaskStatus | fields=enum:TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED
    21→
    22→[SECTION] State Machine Rules
    23→[TRANSITION] TODO -> IN_PROGRESS
    24→[TRANSITION] IN_PROGRESS -> TODO
    25→[TRANSITION] IN_PROGRESS -> DONE
    26→[TRANSITION] DONE -> CLOSED
    27→[TERMINAL] CLOSED (no outgoing transitions)
    28→
    29→[SECTION] Error Format
    30→[FORMAT] status:int,message:string,errors?:string[]
    31→
    32→[SECTION] Amendment Log

1→# M1: Authentication (JWT)
     2→
     3→## 需求描述
     4→
     5→本模組提供基於 JWT（JSON Web Token）的使用者身份驗證機制，包含註冊、登入與取得當前使用者資訊三項核心功能。所有需要身份驗證的 API 端點皆透過 JWT Bearer Token 進行授權驗證。
     6→
     7→使用者註冊時須提供唯一的使用者名稱、密碼與顯示名稱。密碼必須使用 bcrypt 雜湊後儲存，禁止以明文形式保存。登入成功後回傳 JWT Token，Token 包含使用者 ID 與過期時間資訊。
     8→
     9→受保護的端點需在 HTTP Header 中攜帶 `Authorization: Bearer <token>`，伺服器驗證 Token 的有效性與過期狀態後才允許存取。
    10→
    11→## 驗收標準
    12→
    13→- AC1: 呼叫 POST /api/auth/register 帶入合法的 username、password、displayName，回傳 HTTP 201 且回應包含新建使用者的 id、username、displayName
    14→- AC2: 呼叫 POST /api/auth/register 帶入已存在的 username，回傳 HTTP 409 Conflict 且回應包含錯誤訊息
    15→- AC3: 儲存於資料庫中的 password 欄位為 bcrypt 雜湊值，非明文密碼
    16→- AC4: 呼叫 POST /api/auth/login 帶入正確的 username 與 password，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應包含 token（非空字串）和 expiresIn 欄位
    17→- AC5: 呼叫 POST /api/auth/login 帶入錯誤的 password，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
    18→- AC6: 呼叫 POST /api/auth/login 帶入不存在的 username，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
    19→- AC7: 攜帶有效 JWT Token 呼叫 GET /api/auth/me，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應包含 id、username、displayName
    20→- AC8: 不攜帶 Authorization Header 呼叫 GET /api/auth/me，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
    21→- AC9: 攜帶過期的 JWT Token 呼叫 GET /api/auth/me，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
    22→- AC10: 攜帶格式錯誤的 JWT Token 呼叫 GET /api/auth/me，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
    23→- AC11: 註冊時 username 少於 3 字元或超過 50 字元，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    24→- AC12: 註冊時 password 少於 8 字元，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    25→- AC13: 註冊時 displayName 為空或超過 100 字元，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    26→- AC14: 註冊時 username 包含非英數字或底線的字元（如空格、特殊符號），回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    27→
    28→## API 端點
    29→
    30→### POST /api/auth/register
    31→- 說明: 註冊新使用者
    32→- Request Body:
    33→  ```json
    34→  {
    35→    "username": "string (3-50 chars, alphanumeric + underscore)",
    36→    "password": "string (min 8 chars)",
    37→    "displayName": "string (1-100 chars)"
    38→  }
    39→  ```
    40→- Success Response: 201 Created
    41→  ```json
    42→  {
    43→    "id": "long",
    44→    "username": "string",
    45→    "displayName": "string"
    46→  }
    47→  ```
    48→- Error Responses: 400 (validation failed), 409 (username already exists)
    49→
    50→### POST /api/auth/login
    51→- 說明: 使用者登入，取得 JWT Token
    52→- Request Body:
    53→  ```json
    54→  {
    55→    "username": "string",
    56→    "password": "string"
    57→  }
    58→  ```
    59→- Success Response: 200 OK
    60→  ```json
    61→  {
    62→    "token": "string (JWT)",
    63→    "expiresIn": "number (seconds, 86400)"
    64→  }
    65→  ```
    66→- Error Responses: 401 (wrong credentials)
    67→
    68→### GET /api/auth/me
    69→- 說明: 取得當前已登入使用者資訊
    70→- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
    71→- Success Response: 200 OK
    72→  ```json
    73→  {
    74→    "id": "long",
    75→    "username": "string",
    76→    "displayName": "string"
    77→  }
    78→  ```
    79→- Error Responses: 401 (missing/invalid/expired token)
    80→
    81→## 業務規則
    82→
    83→- BR1: username 長度限制 3-50 字元，僅允許英文字母、數字與底線（正則: `^[a-zA-Z0-9_]{3,50}$`）
    84→- BR2: password 最少 8 字元，無上限限制
    85→- BR3: displayName 長度限制 1-100 字元，允許任意 Unicode 字元
    86→- BR4: password 使用 bcrypt 演算法雜湊後儲存，不得以明文儲存
    87→- BR5: JWT Token 有效期為 24 小時（86400 秒）
    88→- BR6: username 在系統中必須唯一（不區分大小寫或區分大小寫皆可，但同一字串不可重複）
    89→- BR7: 登入失敗時不應區分「使用者不存在」與「密碼錯誤」，統一回傳 401 以防止帳號列舉攻擊
    90→
    91→## 相依模組
    92→
    93→- 依賴: 無
    94→- 被依賴: M2 (Task CRUD)、M3 (Task State Machine)、M4 (Tag System) — 所有需要身份驗證的模組
    95→

content.text:
Now let me review the SecurityConfigIntegrationTest -- the `/api/auth/me` endpoint actually requires auth (it's GET, not under the permitAll umbrella for POST-style auth endpoints). Wait, looking at the SecurityConfig, `/api/auth/**` is `permitAll()`, so GET `/api/auth/me` would also be permitted. But the spec says AC8: "not carrying Authorization header to call GET /api/auth/me returns 401". This means the 401 comes from the controller/filter level, not the security config permitAll. Let me re-examine.

Looking at the plan constraints: "all /api/** require auth except /api/auth/** and /h2-console/**". But the acceptance criteria say `/api/auth/me` should return 401 without a token. This is a contradiction -- the SecurityConfig permits all `/api/auth/**`, but the `/api/auth/me` endpoint must enforce auth at the application level (since it needs the current user). 

The existing SecurityConfig has `.requestMatchers("/api/auth/**").permitAll()` which means the security filter chain allows access, but the controller itself would need to check authentication. However, the task description says the worker should "Modify existing: add JwtAuthFilter, /api/auth/** permitAll", so the approach matches -- the filter sets auth but doesn't block. The `/api/auth/me` endpoint would check programmatically.

Actually, thinking more carefully: the task says `/api/auth/**` permitAll means Spring Security won't reject the request. The JWT filter sets authentication if a valid token exists. The `/api/auth/me` controller would read the authentication from SecurityContext and if null, return 401 itself. BUT that's a controller concern (M1 Auth API = T2), not the T1 foundation concern.

Let me adjust the SecurityConfigIntegrationTest to correctly test what T1 is responsible for -- that `/api/auth/register` and `/api/auth/login` don't return 401 from the security filter, and that non-auth endpoints do return 401.

Let me fix the test for `/api/auth/me` -- since it's under `/api/auth/**` with permitAll, the security config will NOT return 401. The 401 will come from the controller level. So my test is wrong there. Let me update it.

I need to fix the `/api/auth/me` test. Since `/api/auth/**` is `permitAll()` in SecurityConfig, the security filter chain won't produce a 401 for that path. The 401 for `/api/auth/me` will come from the controller (T2's responsibility). So I should change it to test that `/api/auth/me` is NOT blocked by security config (it's under permitAll), and instead test a truly protected endpoint.

content.text:
Here is the summary of what was done.

---

**Test files created (5 files, 40 tests total):**

1. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/entity/UserEntityTest.java`** (6 tests, `@DataJpaTest`)
   - Persist user with all fields and auto-generated id
   - Auto-generate `createdAt` timestamp
   - Enforce unique username constraint
   - Reject null username
   - Reject null password
   - Auto-generate distinct ids for multiple users

2. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/repository/UserRepositoryTest.java`** (4 tests, `@DataJpaTest`)
   - `findByUsername` returns user when exists
   - `findByUsername` returns empty when not found
   - `findByUsername` returns empty for null input
   - `findByUsername` finds correct user among multiple

3. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtTokenProviderTest.java`** (13 tests, plain unit tests)
   - **Generation**: non-empty token, different tokens for different users, valid JWT format (3 dot-separated parts)
   - **Parsing**: extract userId from token, correct userId for different users
   - **Validation**: valid token returns true, expired token returns false, malformed token returns false, empty/null token returns false, tampered signature returns false, wrong secret returns false, random string returns false

4. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/security/JwtAuthFilterTest.java`** (9 tests, `@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)`)
   - Valid token sets `SecurityContext` authentication
   - Valid token sets userId as principal
   - No auth header -> no authentication set, chain continues
   - Non-Bearer prefix -> no authentication set
   - Invalid token -> no authentication set
   - Empty Bearer -> no authentication set
   - "Bearer" only (no token) -> no authentication set
   - Filter chain always continues regardless of validity
   - `getUserIdFromToken` not called when validation fails

5. **`C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/security/SecurityConfigIntegrationTest.java`** (8 tests, `@SpringBootTest` + `MockMvc`)
   - `/api/auth/register` permitted without auth
   - `/api/auth/login` permitted without auth
   - `GET /api/tasks` returns 401 without token
   - `POST /api/tasks` returns 401 without token
   - `/api/auth/me` not blocked by security filter (permitAll on `/api/auth/**`)
   - Invalid token on protected endpoint returns 401
   - Expired token on protected endpoint returns 401
   - No HTTP session created (stateless policy)

**Supporting file created:**
- `C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/resources/application.yml` -- test-specific config with H2 in-memory DB and JWT test secret.

**Key design decisions:**
- `JwtTokenProvider` tests assume a constructor `JwtTokenProvider(String secret, long expirationMs)` -- pure unit tests, no Spring context.
- `JwtAuthFilter` tests assume a constructor `JwtAuthFilter(JwtTokenProvider tokenProvider)` and that the filter extends `OncePerRequestFilter` with a public `doFilterInternal` method.
- `SecurityConfigIntegrationTest` correctly accounts for `/api/auth/**` being `permitAll` in the security filter chain -- the `/api/auth/me` 401 enforcement is the controller's responsibility (T2), not the security config's.
- All tests are RED by design: no implementation classes exist yet, so they will all fail to compile until the Worker creates the implementation files.
